creator: feenberg@nber.org
text:
"make checksum" reports on success or failure, but as far as I can tell, 
does not save any files, or report the actual checksums on failure. If I 
am wrong, please tell me where to look or what option to specify. I 
mentioned that in my last message (above). I have tried it again just now, 
and looked in all the directories in /usr/ports/devel/mingw32-bin-msvcrt 
and not found any downloaded files or checksums.

> checksums. When it does fetch them, see what Sourceforge mirror it downloaded 
> from.  The first one is usually heanet unless you changed the order yourself.

I have not changed anything other than the portsnap server (to 
portsnap2.freebsd.org).

Daniel Feenberg
